description: The UserspaceRadiantDash is better described on the dedicated page, Dash Menu.

fields.BlockOpenClose: Whether to block opening and closing of the dash
fields.Freeform: Whether the dash can be grabbed around in freeform style.
fields._dash: The radiant dash component that handles all the dash like behaviors/
fields._dashVisualRoot: The root slot for the visuals of the radiant dash.
fields._positioner: Handles positioning the dash in front of the user while it is in user space.
fields._modalOverlay: Handles managing the different overlays on different screens like the home tab.
fields._legacyInventoryPanel: Legacy. not used in newer versions. From a time before time when UIX didn't exist.
fields._legacyInventory: Legacy. not used in newer versions. From a time before time when UIX didn't exist.
fields._slider: The slider used to move the dash around via grabbing it.
fields._lookat: The lookat component that handles keeping the dash facing the user.
fields._uiEditModeToggle: The slot that appears when the user has the ability to turn off UI edit mode after turning it on.
fields._alwaysOnFacetRoot: This slot stores elements of the dash that were made on a facet that are marked as always on. Things that end up here will have a Always On Facet Module Component so they always stay enabled even when the dash closes.
fields._screensWorkspace: The workspace for screens that should be saved when the user's dash gets saved. helps preserve dash customization between machines.
fields._topWorkspace: The workspace for top area elements that should be saved when the user's dash gets saved. helps preserve dash customization between machines.
fields._notifications: The component that handles notifications for the game for the current session and people coming online.
fields._notificationsRoot: The slot that contains the entirety of the notifications stack and logic.
fields._notificationsHolder: The slot at which notification elements should appear like users joining and role changing.

methods.OnModalOverlayRequested: handles when the modal overlay request action is made.
methods.OnTurnOffEditMode: Handles when the user requests to turn off edit mode via the button at the bottom of the dash.
methods.SetupDefaultTopBar: Handles when the dash requests a setup of a fresh new dash topbar.
methods.OnHide: Handles hiding of legacy panels on dash elements that still use it.
